channel.title: FilmyChill — New Movies & OTT Releases This Week in the US
channel.description: What's worth watching this week in the US — new theatre and OTT releases with ratings and verdicts. Updated twice daily.

item.title: The Odyssey — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.1 · Decent one-time watch — Odysseus, the legendary King of Ithaca, embarks on a long and perilous journey home following the Trojan War.

item.title: Salcedo, Leather, and Boogaloo — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Not enough ratings yet — Martín Salcedo is rarely swept off his feet — until Verónica Pinilla and Quiebra Canto turn up the party, booze and danger.

item.title: Miguel Ángel Blanco: The 48 Hours That Changed Spain — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · Just released — verdict soon — This documentary explores how Miguel Ángel Blanco's 1997 abduction turned fear into collective resistance and shaped Spain's fright Against ETA terrorism.

item.title: I'm Not Afraid — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — 10-year-old Miguel stumbles upon a terrifying secret involving a boy trapped in a hole near his home.

item.title: Moana — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 5.6 · Decent one-time watch — Teenage Moana answers the Ocean's call and, for the first time, voyages beyond the reef of her island of Motunui with infamous demigod Maui on an unforgettable…

item.title: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- — Hulu
item.description: Hulu · Japanese · ★ 8.0 · Must watch — Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world.

item.title: Enola Holmes 3 — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · English · ★ 7.0 · Worth a watch — Adventure follows detective Enola Holmes to Malta, where her plans to tie the knot unravel when Sherlock's disappearance plunges her into a perilous case.

item.title: Evil Dead Burn — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.8 · Worth a watch — After her husband's abrupt death, a woman seeks solace with her in-laws. As they transform into Deadites one by one, she comes to discover that the vows she…

item.title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation — Hulu
item.description: Hulu · Japanese · ★ 8.5 · Must watch — When a 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a truck, his story doesn't end there. Reincarnated in a new world as an infant, Rudy will seize every…

item.title: Silo — Amazon Prime Video
item.description: Amazon Prime Video · English · ★ 8.2 · Must watch — In a ruined and toxic future, thousands live in a giant silo deep underground. After its sheriff breaks a cardinal rule and residents die mysteriously,…

item.title: X-Men '97 — Disney Plus
item.description: Disney Plus · English · ★ 8.6 · Must watch — The X-Men, a band of mutants who use their uncanny gifts to protect a world that hates and fears them, are challenged like never before, forced to face a…

item.title: The Invite — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 7.6 · Must watch — Joe and Angela's marriage is on thin ice. When they invite their enigmatic upstairs neighbors for a dinner party, the night spirals into unexpected places.

item.title: Supergirl — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an…

item.title: Minions & Monsters — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · English · ★ 6.4 · Decent one-time watch — This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters…

item.title: House of the Dragon — YouTube TV
item.description: YouTube TV · English · ★ 8.4 · Must watch — The Targaryen dynasty is at the absolute apex of its power, with more than 15 dragons under their yoke. Most empires crumble from such heights.

item.title: Oasis — Netflix
item.description: Netflix · Spanish · ★ 6.2 · Decent one-time watch — Oasis is the most luxurious holiday resort in the country — a paradise reserved for the wealthiest families, featuring private beaches, VIP facilities, and…

item.title: Romería — Theatres
item.description: Theatres · Spanish · ★ 6.5 · Worth a watch — With her mother's diary in hand, Marina's search for official documents for university leads her to her biological family on the Atlantic coast.
